allow: Bash(sed -i 's/description="AI Coding Assistant CLI Backend with Multi-Channel + Workspace/description="AI Coding Assistant CLI Backend with Multi-Channel + Workspace + Git"/g' backend/main.py)
Bash(sed -i 's/from api.routes import chat, health, session, task, channel, workspace/from api.routes import chat, health, session, task, channel, workspace, git/g' backend/main.py)

Bash(sed -i 's/app.include_router\(workspace.router, prefix="\\\\/api\\\\/v1", tags=\\["workspace"\\]/app.include_router\(workspace.router, prefix="\\\\/api\\\\/v1", tags=["workspace"]\)\\napp.include_router\(git.router, prefix="\\\\/api\\\\/v1", tags=["git"]/g' backend/main.py)
Bash(python -m py_compile services/memory_service.py services/pr_service.py services/notification_service.py api/routes/memory.py api/routes/git.py main.py)
